reasoning: Based on the staff notes in the order comments, this refund should be approved as an exception. Key factors: 1) Lisa Anderson is a VIP customer with 42 orders and $6,200 lifetime value, 2) She has only 2 previous refunds showing she's not abusing the system, 3) While the purchase was 90 days ago (outside the 30-day policy), the customer actually contacted us at day 32 - within policy - but OUR delay in responding caused her to fall outside the policy window, 4) The staff recommendation clearly states to approve as an exception to retain the VIP relationship.
